abstract: Plan REJECTED on 2 Major. Base reconciled (review HEAD cb1b2a0 equals car base 687e942 plus the plan doc only; code ground truth identical). The spine F1 is mechanically correct and proven by probe; F2/F4/F7 verified sound, with F4's placeholder worry shown empirically moot (all records recompute-match). The two blockers are doc-completeness defects: F1 does not enumerate the in-code comments it turns false (same-commit living-docs miss), and F5 is ambiguous plus mis-scopes a closed-enum contract change as coverage-class without the required schema/spec edits or a conformance vector. Both are catchable at plan cost - a success outcome for the gate. Fixes go to the same plan author for a delta re-review.
